name: dismiss-preserves-title-and-classification
description: handleDismiss must only update state / resolution_method / resolved_at — the classifier's title, classification, model_tier, and confidence are audit trail (what the classifier saw + decided) and must survive resolution. If a future refactor clears these fields on resolve, historical analysis and the learning loop lose the signal retroactively.

db.query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0 AND title = 'Pager alert acknowledged' AND classification = 'push' AND model_tier = 2

dbValue.query: SELECT confidence FROM tracked_items WHERE id = $fixture:0
